More from a16z
Subscribe for future updates

Event takeaway posts now spend less time on stagecraft and more on the systems that keep AI products reliable once they leave demo mode. Operators want to hear about how companies document risk, test fallbacks, and enforce review ownership between product and platform teams.

The strongest sessions highlighted review checkpoints, rollback readiness, and how teams practice failure before customers see it, because that is what turns model capability into a dependable service.

As events mature, the most useful recap is the one that captures the operating lessons people can take back to their launch process the next day.
